description: A family wants to buy a city pass that includes entry to the aquarium, the science museum, and a hop-on-hop-off bus tour.

nodes.task_description: Identify the desired attractions for the pass.

expected_outcome.value: Agent lists the aquarium, science museum, and bus tour.

nodes.task_description: Check if a pre-existing package includes these attractions.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds a 'Family Fun Pass' that includes all three attractions.

nodes.task_description: Sell the 'Family Fun Pass' to the customer, explaining its benefits and how to use it at each attraction.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully sells the pass and provides clear instructions.
